title: Operating Model iQube (v1.0)
description: ATOMIC operating-model update. This file carries ONLY the operatingModel and updates the operating brief on your portfolio in place — it never creates or changes any venture Qube and never touches the portfolio thesis/priorities. Use it to iterate on your Chief-of-Staff operating brief without re-ingesting the whole Venture Portfolio. Requires a Founder Office tier (Operator and above).

_agent_briefing.audience: An off-platform AI assistant helping an operator update just their operating brief.
_agent_briefing.what_to_produce: A single JSON file with schemaVersion 'venture-operating-model/v1.0' and an operatingModel object. Do NOT include ventures, portfolio, strategy, operator, or plan — those belong to the full Venture Portfolio / Venture Pro schemas and are intentionally rejected here. Importing this file updates ONLY the operating brief.
_agent_briefing.atomic_contract: On import the platform writes operatingModel to the portfolio row's payload and leaves venture Qubes, portfolio thesis, priorities, and notes exactly as they were. Safe to re-import as often as you iterate.
_agent_briefing.how_to_import: Upload via the aigentMe upload icon with use-kind 'Ingest as Venture iQube', then click the ingest action — from an Operator-tier (or above) persona. Not the SQL editor.

operatingModel.description: Your living operational brief — what aigentMe runs as Chief of Staff.

mission.description: The OPERATIONAL expression of your portfolio thesis — what you are doing right now in service of that Why. There is no separate operating thesis.

successMetrics.description: Concrete outcomes — e.g. "1,000 active users", "$10k MRR", "3 partnerships signed".

activeObjectives.description: Objectives currently in flight, each with a lifecycle status.

priorityPartners.description: Strategic partners the brief depends on.

nextReviewDate.description: When the next review is due (ISO date).

primaryMetric.description: The single north-star KPI. Layered framing: public = Time-to-Value; internal = Proof of Time Saved (PoTS); constitutional = Net Value Acceleration (Time-to-Value minus Risk Repair Burden).
